languages.text: {n}Техножрец продолжает.{/n} "Мое поведение было недостойным и низким, гемункул, а действия — неразумными".
{n}The Tech-Priest continues.{/n} "My conduct was beneath my station, Haemonculus, and my judgement... altogether lacking."
languages.original_text: {n}Техножрец продолжает.{/n} "Мое поведение было недостойным и низким, гемункул, а действия — неразумными".

languages.text: {n}Der Techpriester fährt fort.{/n} "Mein Verhalten war unter meiner Würde, Haemonculus, und mein Urteil ... fehlerhaft."
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest continues.{/n} "My conduct was beneath my station, Haemonculus, and my judgement... altogether lacking."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Techpriester fährt fort.{/n} "Mein Verhalten war unter meiner Würde, Haemonculus, und mein Urteil ... fehlerhaft."

languages.text: {n}Le technoprêtre reprend son discours.{/n} « Ma conduite a été inqualifiable, hémoncule, et j'ai cruellement manqué de jugement. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest continues.{/n} "My conduct was beneath my station, Haemonculus, and my judgement... altogether lacking."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le technoprêtre reprend son discours.{/n} « Ma conduite a été inqualifiable, hémoncule, et j'ai cruellement manqué de jugement. »

languages.text: {n}El tecnosacerdote continúa.{/n} «Mi conducta ha sido indigna de mi posición, Hemónculo, y mi juicio... brillaba por su ausencia».
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest continues.{/n} "My conduct was beneath my station, Haemonculus, and my judgement... altogether lacking."

traits.locale_text: {n}El tecnosacerdote continúa.{/n} «Mi conducta ha sido indigna de mi posición, Hemónculo, y mi juicio... brillaba por su ausencia».

languages.text: {n}Tekno Rahip devam ediyor.{/n} "Mevkime yaraşmayacak davranışlar sergiledim Haimonkulus. Yargım da... Bütünüyle yanlıştı."
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest continues.{/n} "My conduct was beneath my station, Haemonculus, and my judgement... altogether lacking."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tekno Rahip devam ediyor.{/n} "Mevkime yaraşmayacak davranışlar sergiledim Haimonkulus. Yargım da... Bütünüyle yanlıştı."

languages.text: {n}技术神甫继续说道。{/n}“我的行为有失身份，血伶人大人，而我的判断……更是彻底失当。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest continues.{/n} "My conduct was beneath my station, Haemonculus, and my judgement... altogether lacking."

traits.locale_text: {n}技术神甫继续说道。{/n}“我的行为有失身份，血伶人大人，而我的判断……更是彻底失当。”

languages.text: {n}技術司祭は続ける。{/n}「私の振る舞いは、私の身分にふさわしからぬものでした、ハエモンクルス。そして私の判断は……まったくもって足りぬものでした」
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest continues.{/n} "My conduct was beneath my station, Haemonculus, and my judgement... altogether lacking."

traits.locale_text: {n}技術司祭は続ける。{/n}「私の振る舞いは、私の身分にふさわしからぬものでした、ハエモンクルス。そして私の判断は……まったくもって足りぬものでした」
